title: senecio axillifoliatus
intro: Senecio axillifoliatus, also known as the bush geranium or bush daisy, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Senecio axillifoliatus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
